subject: refactor(pwa): embed PWA actions in menu, add update strip and offline warning
body:
Align PWA UI with canva-grid patterns:
- Move install action into BurgerMenu (native prompt or instructions modal)
- Show update as always-visible strip below header ("tap to refresh")
- Show persistent offline warning while disconnected via new useOnlineStatus hook
- Remove dedicated PWABanner component (was top-of-screen banner)
- Remove AsyncStorage-backed install dismiss persistence
- Remove isOfflineReady auto-dismiss and checkForUpdate manual check
- Simplify usePWAInstall (no dismiss/resetDismiss) and usePWAUpdate (no isOfflineReady)

Tags: pwa, ui, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-alignment
Semver: minor
